Class clsActor

java.lang.Object
org.example.clsPerson
org.example.clsActor
public class clsActor extends clsPerson
Represents an actor in the system, extending the base person information with actor-specific details and functionality. This class inherits general personal information from clsPerson and adds actor-specific attributes such as a unique actor identifier.
Since:
1.0
See Also:
  • clsPerson

  • Constructor Details

    • clsActor

      public clsActor()
      Default constructor that creates an empty Actor object. All fields are initialized to their default values (0 for integers, null for Strings).

    • clsActor

      public clsActor(int actorID, int personID, String firstName, String middleName, String lastName, String dateOfBirth)
      Parameterized constructor that creates an Actor object with specified values. Initializes both the inherited person attributes and the actor-specific ID.
      Parameters:
      actorID - the unique identifier for this actor
      personID - the unique identifier for the person (inherited from clsPerson)
      firstName - the first name of the actor, should be non-null and non-empty
      middleName - the middle name of the actor, can be null or empty
      lastName - the last name of the actor, should be non-null and non-empty
      dateOfBirth - the date of birth of the actor in the format expected by clsPerson
      Since:
      1.0

  • Method Details

    • getActorID

      public int getActorID()
      Gets the actor ID.
      Returns:
      the unique identifier for this actor
      Since:
      1.0

    • setActorID

      public void setActorID(int actorID)
      Sets the actor ID.
      Parameters:
      actorID - the unique identifier to set for this actor
      Since:
      1.0

    • actorDetails

      public String actorDetails()
      Retrieves a formatted string containing key actor details. Provides a convenient one-line summary of the actor's information including their ID and full name.
      Returns:
      a string containing the actor ID and full name
      Since:
      1.0

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this actor. Currently returns the same information as actorDetails(), but may be enhanced in future versions to include additional actor information.
      Overrides:
      toString in class clsPerson
      Returns:
      a string representation containing actor ID and full name
      Since:
      1.0
